context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new implant systems verified: (1) BioHorizons Tapered Pro Conical RBT - 25 implants, drilling protocol aliased to Tapered Pro, (2) BioHorizons Tapered Short Conical RBT - 3 implants (4.2x7.5, 4.6x7.5, 5.2x7.5), drilling protocol aliased to Tapered Short, (3) Conelog Progressive Line - 19 implants, no drilling protocol. React Native Web modal picker interactions have Playwright limitations - recommend testing dropdown via mobile emulator or manual testing for full E2E verification.

BioHorizons_Tapered_Pro_Conical_RBT.indication: Indicated for Immediate Placement and the esthetic zone. Laser Lock Collar surface for connective tissue attachment.

BioHorizons_Tapered_Short_Conical_RBT.indication: Indicated for Bone height of 8, 9, 10 mm.

Conelog_Progressive_Line.indication: Indicated for all bone types (D1–D4). Conical connection with platform switching.
